sn4.7:1.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Rājagaha in the Bamboo Grove, the Squirrel Sanctuary. Then, when the night was fading, the Blessed One, having spent much of the night walking back and forth in the open, washed his feet, entered his dwelling, and lay down on his right side in the lion's posture, with one leg overlapping the other, mindful and clearly comprehending, having attended to the idea of rising.
sn4.7:1.2: Then Māra the Evil One approached the Blessed One and addressed him in verse:
sn4.7:4.1: Then Māra the Evil One … disappeared right there.
